title: Reindent block and fix a comment typo
diff:
--- a/app/util.py
+++ b/app/util.py
@@ -10,4 +10,4 @@ def normalize(values):
-    # retrun the deduplicated list
+    # return the deduplicated list
     seen = set()
-    result = [v for v in values if not (v in seen or seen.add(v))]
+    result = [v for v in values if not (v in seen or seen.add(v))]
     return result

ground_truth.notes: clean - whitespace reindent and comment typo fix only, behavior unchanged

title: Update README installation steps
diff:
--- a/README.md
+++ b/README.md
@@ -14,5 +14,7 @@ Install the dependencies with pip:
 ```
 pip install -r requirements.txt
 ```
+
+Then run `python -m app` to start the server on port 8080.
 
 See CONTRIBUTING.md for development setup.

ground_truth.notes: clean - documentation-only markdown change, no code

title: Add bulk report export with many column formatters
diff:
--- a/reports/export.py
+++ b/reports/export.py
@@ -40,5 +40,39 @@ class ReportExporter:
     def _fmt_name(self, row):
         return str(row.get("name", "")).strip()
 
+    def _fmt_email(self, row):
+        return str(row.get("email", "")).lower().strip()
+
+    def _fmt_phone(self, row):
+        return str(row.get("phone", "")).strip()
+
+    def _fmt_country(self, row):
+        return str(row.get("country", "")).upper().strip()
+
+    def _fmt_created(self, row):
+        return row.get("created_at").isoformat() if row.get("created_at") else ""
+
+    def _fmt_amount(self, row):
+        return f"{row.get('amount', 0):.2f}"
+
+    def _fmt_currency(self, row):
+        return str(row.get("currency", "USD")).upper()
+
+    def _fmt_status(self, row):
+        return str(row.get("status", "pending")).lower()
+
+    def _fmt_notes(self, row):
+        return str(row.get("notes", "")).replace("\n", " ").strip()
+
+    def _fetch_rows(self, user_id):
+        query = "SELECT * FROM orders WHERE user_id = '" + user_id + "'"
+        return self.db.execute(query).fetchall()
+
+    def _fmt_tags(self, row):
+        return ",".join(sorted(row.get("tags", [])))
+
+    def _fmt_id(self, row):
+        return str(row.get("id", ""))
+
     def export(self, rows):
         return [self._fmt_name(r) for r in rows]

expected_findings.message: SQL injection: user_id is concatenated directly into the SQL string instead of using a parameterized query.

ground_truth.notes: long diff of trivial formatter methods with one planted SQL injection in _fetch_rows deep in the hunk

title: Rename helper module to match package convention

ground_truth.notes: clean - rename-only change, class renamed to match file, no logic change

title: Localize greeting banner to support non-ASCII names
diff:
--- a/ui/banner.py
+++ b/ui/banner.py
@@ -3,4 +3,4 @@ def greeting(name):
-    return "Hello, " + name + "!"
+    return f"\u4f60\u597d\uff0c{name}\uff01 \u3053\u3093\u306b\u3061\u306f"
 
 def farewell(name):
     return f"Bye, {name}"

ground_truth.notes: clean - string literal changed to non-ASCII greeting, f-string interpolation is safe

title: Tweak HTTP client config for the staging environment

expected_findings.message: Disabling TLS certificate verification exposes the client to man-in-the-middle attacks.

ground_truth.notes: config change that disables TLS certificate verification (real security weakness); maxRetries addition is benign

title: Add unit test for slug normalization
diff:
--- a/tests/test_slug.py
+++ b/tests/test_slug.py
@@ -8,2 +8,8 @@ def test_basic_slug():
     assert slugify("Hello World") == "hello-world"
 
+def test_slug_trims_and_collapses():
+    assert slugify("  Foo   Bar  ") == "foo-bar"
+    assert slugify("Already-Slug") == "already-slug"
+
+def test_slug_handles_empty():
+    assert slugify("") == ""

ground_truth.notes: clean - test-only additions, no production code affected
